name: Scott's Natura
description: Scott’s Natura is a middle of the road picture control that accents natural colors, compliments skin tones, and is suitable for everyday shooting. It does not lean into overly warm or faded aesthetics, but provides a more neutral canvas on which to create. Whites are primarily controlled by white balance - shoot A0 and you have a very cool recipe, but shoot Cloudy and you can really warm it up. There are many possibilities by simply tweaking WB as you shoot.
author: Scott Tucker
